reading: Rain sheets off the first pylon and folds into the drain. For this beat the channel drinks the light and gives nothing back; the pier still holds its edge.

bands.name: The structural pier
bands.state: Beam-exposed · the beam reaches it first

liveRegion: Rain sheets off the first pylon and folds into the drain. For this beat the channel drinks the light and gives nothing back; the pier still holds its edge.
